name: Ramkrishna Vaze
description: '''Ramkrishnabuwa Vaze''', also known as '''Vazebuwa''', (28 November 1871 – 5 May 1945) was a [[Hindustani Classical music]]ian of the [[Gwalior gharana|Gwalior tradition]] known for his impact on popularizing classical music and its impression on [[Natyageet]] in the early half of the 20th century.
